final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-concept-art
Asset type: detailed steampunk mechanical apparatus illustration, square format
Primary request: intricate steampunk mechanical device with complex gears, pipes, and gauges
Scene/backdrop: dark workshop interior with ambient steam and warm industrial glow
Subject: elaborate mechanical apparatus featuring interlocking gears of varying sizes, copper and brass pipes, pressure gauges with analog dials, riveted metal panels, and ornate Victorian decorative flourishes
Style/medium: detailed concept art illustration, painterly with high mechanical precision
Composition/framing: front-facing centered composition, full apparatus in frame, slight three-quarter angle to show depth
Lighting/mood: warm amber and golden light from internal glowing elements, dramatic side lighting casting deep shadows, nostalgic and grandiose industrial mood
Color palette: warm brass gold, aged copper brown, verdigris green accents, deep mahogany, ivory gauge faces, soft amber glow highlights
Materials/textures: polished and patinated brass surfaces, hammered copper tubing, leather-wrapped handles, glass gauge covers, riveted iron plates, engraved Victorian ornamental borders
Constraints: all mechanical elements must be coherent and physically plausible; Victorian decorative motifs (scrollwork, filigree, floral engravings) integrated into structural parts
Avoid: modern plastic components, neon colors, digital sci-fi aesthetics, cartoonish proportions
